name: Field 44
about: Field 44 is an indoor sports training and recreation facility offering a full-sized 70-foot batting cages, an expansive training field, and advanced sports technology. They provide a space for off-season drills and specialized skill development in various sports including baseball, softball, soccer, football, lacrosse, and golf. The venue caters to a range of needs from individual practice to group events with sports-themed parties and activities. For golf enthusiasts, they feature Full Swing Golf Simulators for realistic practice and swing refinement available in 30-minute and hour increments.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Golf Simulators are endorsed by PGA professionals like Tiger Woods
Advanced 5D-AI Machine Learning Radar provides sophisticated data on 16 points of club and ball
Available for practice regardless of weather conditions
Professional setting for refining swings with real-time analytics

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is welcome at no additional charge
Outside drinks are welcome at no additional charge

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-tier choice endorsed by Tiger Woods and other PGA professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify. Please contact Field 44 directly for details on whether golf clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are welcome at no additional charge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a time for 18 holes. Golf simulator rental is available in 30-minute and hour increments.

faq.question: Is Field 44 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Field 44 offers a Kids Fun Party Package, hosts various youth sports programs, and is generally described as a family-friendly facility for kids and juniors.
